full_text:
Bo Xiaochang 柏孝長
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bo Xiaochang (柏孝長)was born in Nanyang. An officer of Merit who first hid when Liu Biao attacked, but took part in fighting after 5 days. Bo Xiaochang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
